name: Raisin-Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the oatmeal cookie mix in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the eggs, milk, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves to the bowl.
3. Using a spoon, stir the ingredients until they are well combined.
4. Combine the raisins and chopped nuts, then stir them into the mixture.
5. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough 2 inches apart onto baking sheets.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
7. Makes 4 dozen cookies.
